Traits<ref>https://www.meaningcrisis.co/ep-45-awakening-from-the-meaning-crisis-the-nature-of-wisdom/</ref>

* Mindfulness
* Insight
* Events/Process
* failure: misconstrual/misframing
* S1 processing

{{Quote|Procedural knowledge (techne): For example, knowing how to compose a symphony or how to throw a baseball perfectly. Often people who are capable of doing such things are unable to put this knowledge into a list of propositions. Moreover, one can’t learn how to be an expert pitcher by reading textbooks on baseball. 
|[[awakeningfromthemeaningcrisis.com]]<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20210307142111/https://awakeningfromthemeaningcrisis.com/knowledge</ref>}}[[Category:John Vervaeke]]
[[sn:Procedural knowing]]==References==
[[Category:Knowledge]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Procedural knowing]][[Category:Pages that existed before the Great November Outage]]
[[sn:Procedural knowing]][[sn:Procedural knowing]]
[[Category:Pages]]
